description: pack_root_sha256 set to all zeros, breaking D12 invariant. Manifest re-signed so signature is valid.
mutation: pack_root_sha256: set to '0' * 64 (differs from attestation_sha256). Re-signed.
note: Signature verification passes because the manifest was re-signed. The D12 check catches the invariant break independently.
conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier MUST report passed=false with at least one E_MANIFEST_TAMPER referencing pack_root_sha256.
